test-audio-ru.mp3
-----------------
Source: LibriVox recording of Anton Chekhov's "Человек в футляре"
        (The Man in a Case), read in Russian.
Item:   https://archive.org/details/chelovek_2103_librivox
File:   chelovekvfutliare_04_chekhov_128kb.mp3 (re-encoded to mono 64 kbps)

LibriVox recordings are in the PUBLIC DOMAIN. They are free to use for
any purpose, including this app's broadcast test feature. No attribution
is legally required; this note is kept for provenance only.
